sidebar.placeholder_coords: Coordinates will appear here, or paste them manually...

status_box.drawing_polygon: Tap to add points • ❌ to finish (≥ 3 points)
status_box.drawing_line: Tap to add points • ❌ to finish (≥ 2 points)
status_box.done: Add, drag, or delete points to adjust • Tap 📸 to capture
status_box.modified: Changed → Tap 📸 to create new snapshot

map_controls.tooltip_draw_poly: Draw plot boundary (Press ESC to exit)

snapshot.alert_draw_first: Please draw a polygon or line first!
snapshot.alert_finish_drawing: Please finish your drawing first before creating a snapshot!

alerts.no_coordinates: No coordinates found! Please enter your data.
alerts.need_2_points: At least 2 points are required to draw a path!
alerts.need_3_points: At least 3 points are required to draw a boundary!
alerts.select_province_first: Please select a Province/Central Meridian before entering VN2000 coordinates!
alerts.out_of_bounds:
⚠️ RED ALERT: These VN-2000 coordinates DO NOT FALL INSIDE {province}!

You may have selected the wrong Central Meridian. Please double check!
alerts.restricted_overlap: 🛑 ACCESS DENIED: These coordinates overlap with a restricted area!
alerts.restricted_close: 🛑 ACCESS DENIED: The plot is too close to a restricted area ({distance}m).
